stemHtml:
Given the following information, calculate how much fuel you burn more or less when cruising at FL360 instead of FL320.

Cruise speed: M 0.74
Temperature conditions: ISA
Cruise distance left: 1080 NM
Fuel flow at FL360: 2365 kg/hr
Fuel flow at FL320: 2483 kg/hr
Wind conditions at FL360: 50 kt headwind
Wind conditions at FL320: 50 kt tailwind
